news.title: I can’t help rooting for tiny open source AI model maker Arcee
news.summary: Arcee is a tiny 26-person U.S. startup that built a high-performing, massive, open source LLM. And it's gaining popularity with OpenClaw users.

news.summary: Eclipse will put some of that money towards incubating, or building startups.

news.title: Iranian hackers are targeting American critical infrastructure, US agencies warn
news.summary: A joint FBI, NSA, and CISA advisory warns that Iranian hackers have "escalated" their tactics in response to the ongoing U.S.-Israel war with Iran.

news.title: Firmus, the ‘Southgate’ AI data center builder backed by Nvidia, hits $5.5B valuation
news.summary: Nvidia-backed Asia AI data center provider Firmus has now raised $1.35 billion in six months.

news.title: Amazon is ending support for older Kindles and Kindle Fires
news.summary: Amazon has announced that starting on May 20th, 2026, Kindle e-readers and Kindle Fire devices released in 2012 and earlier will "no longer be able to purchase, borrow, or download new content via the Kindle Store," Amazon spokesperson Jackie Burke wrote in an email to The Verge. news.title: Spotify’s Prompted Playlists can help you find new podcasts to listen to
news.summary: On Tuesday, Spotify expanded its Prompted Playlists feature to include podcasts, an update that could make it easier for Premium users to find new shows to listen to.
